# minio_config_history (Data Source)

Lists MinIO configuration change history. Useful for auditing config changes and identifying restore points.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_config_history" "recent" {
  limit = 10
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of history entries to return (-1 for all).

### Read-Only

- `entries` (List of Object) List of configuration history entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries`

Read-Only:

- `create_time` (String)
- `data` (String)
- `restore_id` (String)
